title: tanacetum flavovirens
intro: Tanacetum flavovirens, also known as yellow chamomile, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a natural remedy for relieving menstrual cramps, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. In herbal preparations, Tanacetum flavovirens is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
